title: Looking for Category Manager at DTDC

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at DTDC
jsonLd.description:
DTDC invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
